arts.ttl: Preview: Holstein Kiel vs. Stuttgart - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's Bundesliga clash between Holstein Kiel and Stuttgart, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

Stuttgart, runners-up last term, have slipped to seventh after just four points in six games, stuttering in their quest to secure a Champions League spot once again. German champions way back in 1912...
